title: Extra Select Chop Shaped Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 70 biscuits)
features: Crunchy dog biscuits treats with a satisfying texture that dogs love, perfect as dog bedtime biscuits or anytime doggie treats
Delicious meaty dog treats bursting with flavour - your hungry pets will love these Extra Select dog treats
Unique dog bone shape in attractive colours, resembling a real meat chop - fun dog treats for large dogs and small dogs alike
Versatile dog treats for training, rewards, or snacks - ideal as dog training treats for small dogs or as senior dog treats
Convenient resealable tub keeps these dog biscuits and treats fresh, whether you're looking for small dog biscuits or big dog treats
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Meaty Chops How to Feed? These Meaty Chops are suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age and serve as an excellent snack or training reward. To ensure a balanced diet, adjust your dog's meal portions accordingly. Always provide fresh drinking water and store the treats in a cool, dry place for maximum freshness. Nutrition Crude Protein 13.7%, Crude Fat 7.5%, Crude Ash 3.7%, Crude Fibre 0.5%, Sodium 0.5% Cereals (Wheat, Corn); Glucose (7,6%); Oils & Fats; Minerals, Colouring; Thickener; Aroma. Tips for Treats Supervised Snacking: Watch your dog while they enjoy their Gravy Bones. Balanced Diet: Remember, treats should only be a small part of a balanced diet. Age Appropriate: Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks old. Meaty Chop Design These Meaty Chops are a fun addition to any dog's diet. Baked to perfection with a unique two-colour design, they're loved for their delicious flavour and satisfying crunch which keeps your companion coming back for more. Nutritionally Valuable With a good balance of crude protein and fats, our Meaty Chops contribute to your dog's daily nutrient intake. They contain more than 13% protein, complemented by a 7.5% fat content for satiety and coat health. Convenient Training Aid These biscuit chops are more than just a tasty treat; they also serve as a helpful training aid. The convenient shape makes them easy to carry and dispense, making your training sessions as smooth as possible.
